response.text:
ACCEPT

rationale: r4c0 at 35% SoC is more vulnerable than our 55% threshold policy allows; minimal 0.5 kWh share prevents cascade failure without compromising self-preservation given network deficit state.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r4c0. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.20 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.55, distrusted_peers=['r2c0'].
Your latest belief: r3c0 critically low (64% SoC, 1.9h runway) and islanded. Peer r2c0 has rejected multiple requests and enforces 55% floor; network in collective deficit. Minimal sharing only to most vulnerable (r4c0 ~35% SoC). Self-preservation required to avoid cascade failure..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
